mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_session (user_id, position, round, difficulty, question_count, max_follow_up, current_question, question_ids, resume_id, interview_type, status, evaluate_status, evaluate_retry_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{position}, #{round}, #{difficulty}, #{questionCount}, #{maxFollowUp}, #{currentQuestion}, #{questionIds}, #{resumeId}, #{interviewType}, #{status}, #{evaluateStatus}, #{evaluateRetryCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_session SET current_question = #{currentQuestion} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_session SET question_ids = #{questionIds} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE interview_session SET difficulty = #{difficulty}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, position, round, difficulty, question_count, max_follow_up, current_question, question_ids, resume_id, interview_type, status, evaluate_status, evaluate_error, report_id, evaluate_retry_count, created_at, updated_at FROM interview_session WHERE id = #{id}
